{{Relic Infobox|Leafy Poultice|2}}
{{R|Leafy Poultice||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relic}}. 

== Obtaining Leafy Poultice ==
At the start of the run, can be offered by {{KW|Neow||2}}.

== Interactions ==

* At Ascension 2 and above, where the player starts out at 80% of max HP, taking the Leafy Poultice will only reduce max HP, not current HP.

== Trivia ==

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.100.0 (BETA)'''
** Max HP loss increased from 10 -> 12.

* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Leafy Poultice to the game.
